personality: 6 Glass / Luxe DARK fused with 7 Dark-First Utility for data screens
personality_one_liner: A cinematic, premium fintech experience where deep atmospheric space meets high-precision, glowing neon data.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for cinematic feel; dense, highly structured layouts for charts and P&L data.

do's: Use heavy blur (expo-blur) on the bottom tab bar and sticky headers.
Apply glass effect over abstract background imagery for holographic cards.
Use subtle translucent brandTertiary tints behind active segment toggles.
dont's: Do not blur dense data rows (like P&L list items) — keep them solid for readability.
Never put thin typography directly on busy textures without a dark scrim.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A cinematic overview of the user's total net worth with currency toggles and visual breakdown.

states.loading: Centered glowing brand spinner on deep navy.
states.empty: Glassy card prompting 'Add your first account'.
states.error: Soft error toast with a 'Retry' action.

screens.layout: Header: profile/settings. Hero: Huge 'Space Grotesk' net worth counter center-aligned, with a sleek segmented control underneath (TL | USD | RUB). Below: An interactive donut chart with a glassmorphism overlay card. Ensure gradient/blur highlights behind the chart.

screens.name: Wallet (Cards & Accounts)
screens.purpose: Simulates a premium digital wallet with physical-feeling holographic cards.

states.empty: Abstract minimalist illustration of an empty wallet with a primary 'Add Card' CTA.
states.error: Retry boundary over the card carousel.

screens.layout: Top half: Horizontal paging carousel of holographic cards (using expo-image backdrops with expo-blur overlay). Each card displays Limit, Debt, and Cut-off date cleanly. Bottom half: Vertical list of linked bank accounts, using minimalist dividers.

screens.name: Expenses
screens.purpose: Utility-first breakdown of spending by categories.
screens.layout: Sticky header with Month selector. Large aggregate expense number. Below: Vertical list of categories (Market, Entertainment, Bills). Each row uses a tinted icon container (surfaceTertiary) and shows a progress bar against a budget.

screens.name: Investments
screens.purpose: Live tracking of Stocks, Crypto, Funds, and Gold with distinct P&L indicators.

states.empty: 'Build your portfolio' CTA with a glass-tinted illustration.

screens.layout: Top: Total Portfolio Value and a large neon green (or red) 24h P&L chip. Filter chips below (All, Stocks, Crypto, Gold). Vertical scrolling list of assets. Each asset row shows Asset Name, Amount Held, Cost Basis, and Current Value, with a prominent glowing neon P&L percentage on the right edge.

dashboard_glow.alt: Abstract dark blue textured background with blurred elements

holographic_card_1.alt: multicolored abstract painting for holographic effect

holographic_card_2.alt: Fluid art swirling blue and black tones

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme Strictness: The app is strictly DARK MODE. Use the exact hex codes provided (#050816 for background, #00FF94 for success/positive values, #0066FF for constants).
Net Worth Counter: Use 'Space Grotesk' for all large numbers and metrics. The Dashboard counter should be huge (at least 40pt or 56pt) and visually dominate the top half of the screen.

Holographic Cards: In the Wallet screen, use the provided 'holographic_card_1' and 'holographic_card_2' images as `expo-image` backgrounds for the cards, with an `expo-linear-gradient` scrim and `expo-blur` over them to create a sleek, physical-yet-digital glass card feel.

Data Density: For Expenses and Investments, rely on 'Satoshi' for readable body text. Use right-aligned monospaced-style numerical values if possible. Ensure the P&L values use the `#00FF94` (neon green) and `#FF3366` (red) explicitly.
Currency Toggle: The TL/USD/RUB toggle should be a custom glassmorphic segmented control, not a default OS picker.
Haptics: Add haptic feedback to the currency toggle, tab changes, and card swiping.
DO NOT use pure black (#000000); always use the deep navy #050816 surface color.
